title: YouTube Poop: A Week at the Office with George and Alan
description:
Monday: George is frustrated with Alan's inability to appease, and goes on a vicious rant.

Tuesday: A heated argument about birds gets ugly before turning into a sexy rave party.

Wednesday: After George makes fun of Alan's tiny arms, Alan sets off to find and eat George's parents.

Thursday: Fed up with George's constant abuse, Alan begins plotting his revenge and calls in one of his friends in high places.

Friday: After a night of heavy drug use and rock and roll, George and Alan come back to work, ready to finish off the week.

------------------------------------------------------------
Made using Window's Movie Maker and Adobe Audition.

Enjoy!
